notes: Task 01 is a pure refactor + export rename. No new untrusted input is parsed, no new file paths are constructed from user input, no new network surface, no new exec.Command calls. The pre-existing exec.Command('getconf', 'CLK_TCK') in GetSysticksLocal uses hardcoded arguments (no shell, no env interpolation) and was not modified. The new SysInfo struct is JSON-encoded but only consumed in-process by the recorder/reporter (tar files); JSON tags are static literals. strconv.ParseFloat in formatJiffiesCell/formatBytesCell/formatIODelayCell operates on internal sentinel strings or values produced by the same package — no external attacker can influence them. No hardcoded credentials, secrets, or PII introduced.
